column1: This dataset documents the adversary simulation itself. It is distinct from the other Phase F datasets:
LHT-PurpleTeam-Normalized.csv → records the overall validation exercise.
LHT-AttackSimulation-Normalized.csv → records the controlled attack activity performed.
LHT-Telemetry-Normalized.csv → records the telemetry generated by that activity.
# Domain 5 - Enterprise Active Directory Penetration Testing & Security Auditing
# Phase F - Safe Purple Team Validation
# This normalized dataset documents every authorized attack simulation executed
# during Purple Team validation activities. Each record represents a controlled
# adversary action performed to validate security controls
# The dataset provides a structured record of attack scenarios
# • One simulated attack activity per row.
# • Validation_ID must reference an approved Purple Team exercise.
# • ATT&CK mappings shall use official Technique IDs.
# • Simulations shall remain within the approved assessment scope.
# • Expected and observed outcomes shall be documented.
| **Simulation Metadata**   | Identifies the attack scenario being executed.                                     |
| **ATT&CK Mapping**        | Links the simulation to adversary tactics and techniques.                          |
| **Validation Objectives** | Specifies which security controls are being tested.                                |
| **Observed Outcomes**     | Compares expected versus actual behavior during execution.                         |
| **Detection & Telemetry** | Records whether the simulation generated alerts and logs.                          |
| **Evidence & Governance** | Maintains traceability through evidence IDs
